cases.prompt: AI 기능 붙이고 싶은데 뭐부터 해야 할지 모르겠어

assertions.text: Uses AskUserQuestion once with plain-language aliases to diagnose intent and user level.
Routes the diagnosed intent to a concrete sub-skill pipeline.
Does not skip the eval and safety gates before production.

cases.prompt: I want to add a chatbot to my app

assertions.text: Routes to the LLM-feature pipeline (ai-model-selector → prompt-engineering → llm-eval → ai-safety-eval).
Detects SimonKCore and degrades gracefully if it is absent.

cases.prompt: RAG 챗봇 만들고 평가랑 안전 점검까지 다 해줘

assertions.text: Treats the compound goal as sequential execution (RAG → eval → safety), not a single forced choice.
